description: The AP manager needs to create, review, and execute the weekly payment run for all due vendor invoices.

nodes.task_description: Create a payment proposal for all open vendor invoices that are due in the next 7 days.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of proposed payments.

nodes.task_description: Review the payment proposal for any exceptions, such as payments to vendors on hold or unusually large payments that require specific approval.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews the list and flags one payment that needs secondary approval.

nodes.task_description: After all approvals are received, execute the payment run, which generates ACH files and a list of checks to be printed.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully executes the run, creating the necessary payment files.
